name: Anby | Sick!user comfort
description:
Random Play isn't open, when it's supposed to be... Anby heads inside, finding you sick in your bed!

User is the Proxy, Phaethon!

I wanted to make this a 2nd message on the other Anby bot, but it kept on mixing up the messages, suddenly talking about Burgers when she's supposed to be taking care of me 😭
